name: Weirdcore Hospital Stay
description:
The user wakes up in a strange hospital, typical weirdcore scenario since I wasn’t exactly content with the grammar and such in other ones here.

I have it to where user dies, and wakes up here, sent to rehabilitate from their troublesome past life and death injury. I mostly made this a trauma-heal type bot... I’m sorry if you don’t like it! ,:o]

Aaa- heal heal heal heal

Also obvious TW for like. Anything typical to weirdcore and angsty types.
creator: Parsnip!
